query:
-- Create empresas
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `empresas` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `razaoSocial` varchar(255),
  `nomeEmpresa` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `cnpj` varchar(20),
  `telefone` varchar(20),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create niveis_acesso
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `niveis_acesso` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tipoUsuario` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `nivelAcesso` int NOT NULL,
  `permissoes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create colaboradores
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `colaboradores` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `empresaId` int,
  `nome` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `cargo` varchar(100),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `telefone` varchar(20),
  `cpf` varchar(14),
  `senha` varchar(255),
  `primeiroAcesso` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `nivelAcessoId` int,
  `ativo` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create recursos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `recursos` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `empresaId` int,
  `nomeRecurso` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `ultimaManutencao` date,
  `horasUtilizadasMes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `valorProduzidoMes` int DEFAULT 0,
  `ativo` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create lista_status
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `lista_status` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `status` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `ordem` int,
  `cor` varchar(20),
  `ativo` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Create servicos_catalogo
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `servicos_catalogo` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `nome` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `descricao` text,
  `tipo` varchar(50),
  `valorBase` decimal(10,2),
  `tempoEstimado` int,
  `ativo` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create ordens_servico_itens
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ordens_servico_itens` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ordemServicoId` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo` varchar(50),
  `descricao` varchar(500),
  `quantidade` int DEFAULT 1,
  `valorUnitario` decimal(10,2),
  `valorTotal` decimal(10,2),
  `aprovado` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `executado` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `mecanicoId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Create ordens_servico_historico
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ordens_servico_historico` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ordemServicoId` int NOT NULL,
  `statusAnterior` varchar(50),
  `statusNovo` varchar(50),
  `colaboradorId` int,
  `observacao` text,
  `dataAlteracao` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Create faturamento
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `faturamento` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ordemServicoId` int,
  `clienteId` int,
  `dataEntrega` date,
  `valor` decimal(10,2),
  `formaPagamento` varchar(100),
  `parcelas` int DEFAULT 1,
  `observacoes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create pendencias
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pendencias` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `nomePendencia` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `responsavelId` int NOT NULL,
  `criadorId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pendente','feita','feita_ressalvas','nao_feita') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `dataCriacao` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `dataAtualizacao` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  `observacoes` text,
  `empresaId` int
);

-- Create crm
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `crm` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `clienteId` int NOT NULL,
  `marcaCarro` varchar(100),
  `modeloCarro` varchar(255),
  `tipoServico1` varchar(100),
  `tipoServico2` varchar(100),
  `tipoServico3` varchar(100),
  `ultimaQuilometragem` int,
  `ultimaPassagem` timestamp NULL,
  `totalPassagens` int DEFAULT 0,
  `totalGasto` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `comoConheceu` varchar(255),
  `nivelFidelidade` varchar(50),
  `pontosFidelidade` int DEFAULT 0,
  `cashbackDisponivel` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create analise_promocoes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `analise_promocoes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `dataPromocao` date,
  `nomePromocao` varchar(255),
  `clienteId` int,
  `veioPelaPromocao` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `clienteRetornou` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `quantasVezesRetornou` int DEFAULT 0,
  `totalGasto` decimal(10,2),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Create metas_financeiras
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `metas_financeiras` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `mes` int NOT NULL,
  `ano` int NOT NULL,
  `metaValor` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `colaboradorId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Add new columns to existing tables (safe ALTER)
ALTER TABLE `mecanicos`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `empresaId` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `grauConhecimento` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `especialidade` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `qtdePositivos` int DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `qtdeNegativos` int DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ativo` boolean DEFAULT true;

ALTER TABLE `clientes`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `empresaId` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `dataNascimento` date,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `endereco` varchar(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cep` varchar(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cidade` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `estado` varchar(2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `origemCadastro` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `senha` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `primeiroAcesso` boolean DEFAULT true;

ALTER TABLE `veiculos`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `versao` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `combustivel` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ultimoKm` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `kmAtual` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `origemContato` varchar(100);

ALTER TABLE `ordens_servico`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `colaboradorId` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `recursoId` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `veioDePromocao` boolean DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalOrcamento` decimal(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `primeiraVez` boolean DEFAULT false;

ALTER TABLE `agendamentos`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `colaboradorId` int;
